summary.en: Bolivia's standards body IBNORCA (Instituto Boliviano de Normalización y Calidad) adopts IEC standards as NB (Norma Boliviana) norms. IEC 62109-1 (General requirements for safety of power converters for use in PV power systems) and IEC 62109-2 (Particular requirements for inverters) are the applicable safety standards for solar PV inverters. The energy regulator AE (Autoridad de Fiscalización de Electricidad y Tecnología Nuclear) oversees licensing and technical conformity of electrical equipment for grid-connected generation. Project owners and ENDE/distributor grid-connection applications in practice require third-party IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory.
summary.zh: 玻利维亚标准机构IBNORCA（玻利维亚标准化与质量研究所）将IEC标准采纳为NB（玻利维亚规范）规范。IEC 62109-1（光伏系统用电力变换器安全通用要求）和IEC 62109-2（逆变器专用要求）是太阳能光伏逆变器的适用安全标准。能源监管机构AE（电力与核技术监督局）负责并网发电电气设备的许可及技术合规监督。项目业主和ENDE/分销商并网申请在实践中需要ILAC认可实验室出具的第三方IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证据。
summary.zht: 玻利維亞標準機構IBNORCA（玻利維亞標準化與質量研究所）將IEC標準採納為NB（玻利維亞規範）規範。IEC 62109-1（光伏系統用電力變換器安全通用要求）和IEC 62109-2（逆變器專用要求）是太陽能光伏逆變器的適用安全標準。能源監管機構AE（電力與核技術監督局）負責併網發電電氣設備的許可及技術合規監督。項目業主和ENDE/分銷商併網申請在實踐中需要ILAC認可實驗室出具的第三方IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證據。

gap.en: GB/T 37408 safety certification does not satisfy Bolivia's IEC 62109-2 requirement. Exporters must obtain IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory covering the specific inverter model or family to be supplied. Existing GB/T 37408 certificates must be supplemented with IEC 62109-1/-2 test reports before submitting to AE licensing review or ENDE/distributor grid-connection applications. Additionally, high-altitude Altiplano deployments (commonly above 3,600 m) require the inverter's altitude rating to be confirmed — IEC 62109 testing is typically conducted at or near sea level; altitude derating for reduced air cooling density must be explicitly addressed in product specifications.
gap.zh: GB/T 37408安全认证不满足玻利维亚的IEC 62109-2要求。出口商须从ILAC认可实验室获取涵盖所供具体逆变器型号或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验证书。现有GB/T 37408证书须在提交AE许可审查或ENDE/分销商并网申请前，补充IEC 62109-1/-2测试报告。此外，高原高海拔部署（通常海拔3,600米以上）需要确认逆变器的海拔额定值——IEC 62109测试通常在海平面或接近海平面处进行；空气冷却密度降低导致的高海拔降额须在产品规格中明确说明。
gap.zht: GB/T 37408安全認證不滿足玻利維亞的IEC 62109-2要求。出口商須從ILAC認可實驗室獲取涵蓋所供具體逆變器型號或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗證書。現有GB/T 37408證書須在提交AE許可審查或ENDE/分銷商併網申請前，補充IEC 62109-1/-2測試報告。此外，高原高海拔部署（通常海拔3,600米以上）需要確認逆變器的海拔額定值——IEC 62109測試通常在海平面或接近海平面處進行；空氣冷卻密度降低導致的高海拔降額須在產品規格中明確說明。

target.en: Mandatory in practice for AE licensing and ENDE/distributor grid-connection project submissions where IEC 62109-referenced requirements apply; mandatory for utility-scale and donor-financed project procurement specifications.
target.zh: 在AE许可及IEC 62109参引要求适用的ENDE/分销商并网项目提交中实际为强制；在公用事业规模和捐助方融资项目采购规格中为强制。
target.zht: 在AE許可及IEC 62109參引要求適用的ENDE/分銷商併網項目提交中實際為強制；在公用事業規模和捐助方融資項目採購規格中為強制。

cn.en: Voluntary — GB/T 37408-2021 is a recommended national standard (GB/T designation); CQC/CGC voluntary certification available but not required under Chinese law.
cn.zh: 自愿——GB/T 37408-2021为推荐性国家标准（GB/T标志）；CQC/CGC自愿认证可选，但中国法律不作强制要求。
cn.zht: 自願——GB/T 37408-2021為推薦性國家標準（GB/T標誌）；CQC/CGC自願認證可選，但中國法律不作強制要求。

source.note: IBNORCA official website; specific NB/IEC 62109 adoption status should be confirmed directly with IBNORCA before finalising compliance package.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A solar PV inverter holding only Chinese GB/T 37408 certification cannot satisfy Bolivia's IEC 62109-2 safety requirement. Plan for IEC 62109-1/-2 type testing by an ILAC-accredited laboratory before submitting equipment documentation for AE licensing or ENDE grid-connection review. For Altiplano sites above 3,600 m, confirm the inverter's altitude derating specification — reduced air density at high elevation affects thermal performance and must be explicitly declared. Verify current IBNORCA NB adoption status and AE licensing requirements directly with IBNORCA and AE before committing to a test programme.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅持有中国GB/T 37408认证的太阳能光伏逆变器无法满足玻利维亚的IEC 62109-2安全要求。在提交设备文件用于AE许可或ENDE并网审查前，应规划由ILAC认可实验室进行的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验。对于海拔3,600米以上的高原站点，须确认逆变器的高海拔降额规格——高海拔空气密度降低会影响热性能，须明确声明。在确定测试方案前，直接向IBNORCA和AE核验现行IBNORCA NB采纳状态和AE许可要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅持有中國GB/T 37408認證的太陽能光伏逆變器無法滿足玻利維亞的IEC 62109-2安全要求。在提交設備文件用於AE許可或ENDE併網審查前，應規劃由ILAC認可實驗室進行的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗。對於海拔3,600米以上的高原站點，須確認逆變器的高海拔降額規格——高海拔空氣密度降低會影響熱性能，須明確聲明。在確定測試方案前，直接向IBNORCA和AE核驗現行IBNORCA NB採納狀態和AE許可要求。

requirement_topic.en: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Safety Evidence — IBNORCA NB/IEC Adoption and AE Equipment Licensing
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全证据——IBNORCA NB/IEC采纳与AE设备许可
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2安全證據——IBNORCA NB/IEC採納與AE設備許可

summary.en: GB/T 37408-2021 (Safety requirements for photovoltaic power generation grid-connected inverters), assessed by CNAS-accredited Chinese laboratories. GB/T 37408 shares conceptual safety intent with IEC 62109-1/-2 but is not harmonised with IEC 62109 and is not accepted as equivalent by IBNORCA, AE, or Bolivia project owners.
summary.zh: GB/T 37408-2021（光伏发电并网逆变器技术要求），由CNAS认可的中国实验室评定。GB/T 37408与IEC 62109-1/-2在安全理念上有共通之处，但未与IEC 62109协调一致，不被IBNORCA、AE或玻利维亚项目业主视为等同。
summary.zht: GB/T 37408-2021（光伏發電併網逆變器技術要求），由CNAS認可的中國實驗室評定。GB/T 37408與IEC 62109-1/-2在安全理念上有共通之處，但未與IEC 62109協調一致，不被IBNORCA、AE或玻利維亞項目業主視為等同。
